response.justification: Aisha brings 15+ years of software development experience well above the 6-year requirement, with solid TypeScript and Node.js proficiency across multiple senior-level production roles. Her current position at re:cinq directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent development requirement precisely. She demonstrates AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB, and a strong TDD culture including authored testing libraries and organized community workshops. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python experience, and her relational database exposure (MySQL) is limited — these are addressable given her breadth and learning track record, but worth probing in interview.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple senior roles in production environments
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework work at re:cinq directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement
Deep testing culture: TDD advocate, authored open-source D-language testing libraries, organized Refactoring Dojos and Code Katas
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, which are core to the primary stack; Playwright also absent
Kotlin and Python are missing from the resume; Java appears only in embedded and robotics contexts, not enterprise backend services
PostgreSQL is not listed; relational database experience appears limited relative to the role's expectations

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Absence of Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin
15+ years senior full-stack breadth with TypeScript and Node.js
